title: gnaphalium eriocephalum
intro: Gnaphalium eriocephalum, also known as woolly cudweed or common cudweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are said to possess medicinal value in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Gnaphalium eriocephalum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to support overall health and well-being.
